roles.name: super_admin
roles.description: CEO-only role. Hidden from every UI listing. Full system access.

roles.name: hr_manager
roles.description: Full HR access across all modules

roles.name: hr_employee
roles.description: HR access with limited scope (no payroll administration)

roles.name: employee
roles.description: Self-service access for own profile, leave, attendance, payslips

permissions.description: Create and edit projects and tasks

leave_types.name: Casual Leave
leave_types.description: Short personal leave. Max 2 days per month. Requires 2 days advance notice - late applications attract double salary deduction. Lapses Dec 31.

leave_types.name: Sick Leave
leave_types.description: Medical/health leave. SL > 2 days requires medical certificate. Can be clubbed with CL but not with EL. Lapses Dec 31.

leave_types.name: Earned Leave
leave_types.description: 1.16 days earned per month. Requires 60 days advance notice. Min 3 days, max 7 days at a time. Max carry-forward 22 days. 7 days each in H1 (Jan–Jun) and H2 (Jul–Dec).

leave_types.name: Personal Leave
leave_types.description: For special events: birthday (self/spouse/children), marriage, anniversary, bereavement. Cannot be accumulated or encashed.

leave_types.name: Leave Without Pay
leave_types.description: Unpaid leave for extraordinary circumstances when all balances are exhausted. Requires 2 days advance notice. Salary deduction = monthly salary / month days × leave days.

leave_types.name: Maternity Leave
leave_types.description: Paid maternity leave. Only available after completing 2 years of service.

leave_types.name: Short Leave
leave_types.description: 2-hour leave (arrive late or leave early). Each use counts as 0.5 day. Max 2 per month - 3rd onwards treated as half-day without pay.

email_templates.name: Welcome Email
email_templates.subject: Welcome to {{company_name}}, {{first_name}}!
email_templates.body_html:
{{company_name}}

Digitally Next Management System

Welcome aboard, {{first_name}}!

We're thrilled to have you join the {{company_name}} family. Your account has been set up and you're ready to get started with the DNMS portal. Below are the details of your profile.

Your Details

Full Name {{first_name}} {{last_name}}
Department {{department}}
Designation {{designation}}
Log In to DNMS Portal

Button not working? Copy and paste this link into your browser:
{{login_url}}

If you have any questions or need assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out to the HR team. We're here to help you settle in smoothly.

This is an automated email from {{company_name}} DNMS. Please do not reply directly to this email.

© {{company_name}}. All rights reserved.

email_templates.name: Password Reset
email_templates.subject: Reset your DNMS password
email_templates.body_html:
DNMS Portal

Password Reset Request

Hi {{first_name}},

We received a request to reset the password for your DNMS account. Click the button below to choose a new password. This link is valid for 1 hour.

Reset My Password

Button not working? Copy and paste this link into your browser:
{{reset_url}}

Didn't request this? If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged and no action is required.

For security reasons, this link will expire in 1 hour. If you need a new link, please visit the login page and request another password reset.

This is an automated email from the DNMS system. Please do not reply directly to this email.

project_phases.name: Initiation
project_phases.description: Define project goals, identify stakeholders, and assess feasibility.

project_phases.name: Planning
project_phases.description: Detailed scheduling, resource allocation, risk analysis, and budgeting.

project_phases.name: Execution
project_phases.description: Active delivery of project work and team coordination.

project_phases.name: Monitoring & Controlling
project_phases.description: Track progress, manage risks, handle change requests, and ensure quality.

project_phases.name: Closing
project_phases.description: Final delivery, client sign-off, retrospective, and project archival.
